about_content:
Amity University is situated in Noida (Uttar Pradesh) and was established in 2005, whereas its online learning constituent, Amity University Online, received approval from UGC in 2018. The Amity University Online offers various undergraduate and postgraduate degree programs in a plethora of specializations to assist students in opting for the right program that aligns with their future objectives and preferences.

The Amity University holds 30+ years of excellence with 89K+ learners across its vast academic network. Amity University Online offers 80+ online learning programs and specializations. The online degree programs were offered at Amity University Online with the sole objective of offering flexibility to working professionals and students who had taken on responsibilities at an early age.

Amity University Online offers diverse learning media, including e-books, print and audiobooks, and virtual lectures, for a complete online learning experience. To make students aligned and focused with the program, there are dedicated academic advisors who guide students at every professional step throughout their academic journey. Amity University Online has a vast and strong alumni network of 250,000+ global learners that includes some renowned personalities such as Disha Patani, Urfi Javed, Himansh Kohli, Kunal Khemu, etc.

There are various UG and PG programs at Amity University online to opt for, but the Amity University Online MBA and Amity University Online BBA are among the most popular programs as they fall under the top UG and QS ranked programs, respectively. The Amity University Online degree is globally accepted and recognized, which ensures the success of students in the global competitive market.
why_choose_content:
• The Amity University Online degree program includes AI-Professor AMI 3.0 i.e. powered by Chat-GPT and Open AI-driven technology, to offer a futuristic online learning environment.
  • Despite being an online learning program, students can easily build a direct bond with their peers and faculty members via on-campus orientation and activities conducted by Amity University Online.
  • To ensure a hassle-free professional career from the beginning, there are multiple career services offered by Amity University Online.
  • The online degree programs of Amity University Online are full-fledged online programs and require zero physical visits to campus.
  • The Amity University Online MBA is ranked by QS as the only online MBA in India.
  • Amity University Online is the only Indian university that offers doorstep delivery of books for online learning programs.
  • Every online program offered at Amity University Online is placement-assisted and the university has 450+ global hiring partners.
  • The Amity University Online has a Metaverse Campus, where students can discover the boundless contingency of the Amity Campus experience.

accreditations.item: Approval for online degrees by the University Grants Commission (UGC).
World Education Services (WES) accreditation in Canada.
Western Association of Schools and Colleges (WASC) accreditation.
Accredited with an “A+” grade by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC).
All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) accreditation.
Ranks #22 under the university category, #37 under the overall category, and #49 under the management category of the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF).
First private university in India to become a prominent member of the Digital Education Council.

admission_steps.item: Prior to enrolling in Amity University Online Login, visit the official website of Amity University Online and go through the eligibility criteria of your preferred program and its specialization.
Students are advised to cross-check their submitted information to avoid any discrepancies or misinformation, or the application will be rejected.

exam_content: The examinations at Amity University Online are conducted through a remote online proctoring system that allows flexibility in taking exams from any corner of the world. The examination process usually depends on the online program chosen by the student; meanwhile, the evaluation of the overall performance of students is calculated via a combination of quizzes, projects, and assignments conducted throughout the academic journey of the student.

faculty_members.item: MBA from the University of Texas

placement_content:
The Amity University Online has a dedicated placement cell that remains active throughout the academic year, and in the meantime, it ensures that every student has acquired the relevant skills and abilities to excel in the global competitive market. To guide students in developing hands-on skills that best fit their chosen industry, it offers 100% placement assistance and a range of career services, including resume-building workshops, virtual job-search support, career counselling, internships, and industry mentorship.

The next-gen career services platform of Amity Online provides the following services:

  • AI-powered resume builder
  • Relevant job mapping via AI tools
  • Human-AI personality assessment
  • Mock video interview
  • Skill analysis
  • Personality test
  • Application tracker
  • Code quest

There are 450+ active hiring partners of Amity University Online, a few of them are mentioned below:

  • MetLif
  • Samsung
  • Nokia
  • IBM
  • Google
  • Genpact
  • Spicejet
  • Microsoft, etc

faqs.question: Is the Amity online degree valid?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Amity University Online degree is accredited and recognized by WES, UGC, NAAC A+, and AICTE, making it completely valid.

faqs.question: How are Amity online exams conducted?
faqs.answer: The examinations for Amity Online are conducted through a remote online proctoring system.

faqs.question: Is an Amity online degree valid for government jobs?
faqs.answer: A degree from Amity Online is completely valid for private and government jobs in India and abroad.

faqs.question: Does Amity University Online provide 100% placement?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity University Online has partnered with 450+ leading MNCs and business corporations that annually recruit students from the university through virtual placement drives, and claims 100% placement with AI-powered career support.

faqs.question: Is the Amity Online degree valid abroad?
faqs.answer: With the WASC and WES approvals, the Amity Online degree is highly credible and valid abroad.

faqs.question: Is Amity's online admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Online has started accepting applications for the academic session of 2026.

faqs.question: How can I take admission to Amity University Online?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website and fill out the Amity University Online form to gain Amity University Online admission..

faqs.question: What is the step-by-step process for the Amity University Online application?
faqs.answer: Visit the official website > Click on Amity University Online login > Select Amity University Online Admission Course > Fill out the Amity University Online form > Pay the required fee > Receive confirmation from the university end.

reviews.item: I enrolled in the online BBA program at Amity Online and it is quite decent. The course content is good, but sometimes there are technical issues during online class

Overall, I had an amazing time at Amity Online their faculty members are supportive and curriculum easily accessible, but there are a few areas for improvement and so far the university has overcome majority of them.
My friend suggested me amity for online MBA and I was worried about my career but I got a decent placement and completely satisfied with the university. HIGHLY RECOMMEND.
Last year I completed my online BA from AMity Online and the best thing I liked about it is their faculty members. I am still in contact with them and they helped me a lot during my graduation.
